title: Wemmbu Mace!
description: It's just Wemmbu mace! Have fun, do whatever you want. I worked really hard on this. Made with love by myafik!
body:
- Now you have your own Wemmbu, but in mace form 🐈. It's just a **fan-made** mace, so don't curse me. 🐶 
- I hope you enjoy it when you play it. **I worked hard on it**.⭐
- **Work on vannila**! No need for any CIT resewn or Optifine.😴
![This is what he looks like in Minecraft!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/866cd14f41199928618bde8d38f1707ea17b5170.jpeg)
